curriculum.title: Integers and Rational Numbers
curriculum.summary: Signed operations, ordering, and rational comparisons.

curriculum.title: Linear Equations
curriculum.summary: Solve one- and two-step equations and unknown-value setups.

curriculum.title: Ratios and Proportions
curriculum.summary: Scale drawings, unit rates, and proportional tables.

curriculum.title: Geometry, Angles, and Triangles
curriculum.summary: Triangle angle sums, exterior angles, and polygon angle logic.

curriculum.title: Area, Volume, and Scale
curriculum.summary: Scale effects, area/volume formulas, and composite figures.

curriculum.title: Coordinate Geometry
curriculum.summary: Distance on grids, midpoint intuition, and graph reading.

curriculum.title: Probability
curriculum.summary: Outcome spaces, equally likely events, and simple expected value.

curriculum.title: Sequences and Functions
curriculum.summary: Tables, linear growth, and recursive-to-explicit reasoning.

curriculum.title: Algebraic Manipulation
curriculum.summary: Simplify expressions, distribute, and combine like terms.

curriculum.title: Logical Reasoning
curriculum.summary: Elimination, parity, invariants, and clever contest shortcuts.
